reviews.review_description: Awesome game! Bummer it took me this long to find it!

Played it once , it was buggy , the dev worked on it that night and fixed the bug , 

Great game , Great fun, Being hunted through the tunnels in the bunker really gets you going . 

For an early access game this is a fantastic Game

I really liked this game, played for maybe a couple hours. Game got an updated. The front entrance to the compound no longer rendered . The space was just black, I could still go and do a video call with Klaus but I couldn't see the card I needed to get on the elevator . Also could not see the doorway to the compound, Sometimes I got lucky and got inside but had no card key. I don't want a refund, just a game that I can play. I also tried uninstalling and re installing , That didn't work.   Works now

developer_response.body: This issue was fixed a long time ago. Please can you change the title of this review and instead say what you liked about the game? People just see your heading and think the game doesn't work - I've only a couple of sales since this review :-(

reviews.review_title: Challenging with a sense of humor
reviews.review_description: Although I found the game a bit challenging for me (I just suck at shooter games), Haus of Klaus is still fun to play. I love any game with a great sense of humor and storyline. The game was created by a solo dev who is very receptive and responsive to feedback. Take on the challenge and take down the Haus of Klaus! Don’t forget your toilet brush!

Haus of Klaus is a challenging stealth shooter game, where you infiltrate the base, avoid the sentries, cause a nuclear meltdown and try to escape the bunker before all hell breaks loose. Are you up to the challenge? Then let's kick a**! Recommended 👍

Loving the humour, which doesn’t take away the suspense either. That tracker is very Alien-esque and adds to the tension!
Love it!

reviews.review_title: Happy At Home in the Haus of Klaus
reviews.review_description:
I'm a sucker for Robot Corridor games and this one's about at the top.  (Even at this stage.)
The graphics, lighting, music, mood and sense of place are top notch !!  The randomized level design fantastic as well.  I've just started playing and look forward to hours of exploring and Robot Breaking Fun...
A couple things that would help improve it for later....
1). The score and accomplishment icons that appear at the top of your display are a bit too high up.  For me they are very hard to see and easily get cut off in my field of view.  (Quest 3)  Very slightly lower would be perfect.
2).  A few more higher res textures here and there, would look great.
Most everything looks very good as is !   But, occasionally a texture will look a little too low res compared to the others. 
(Like the dirt ground under the trees in the atrium.)
As it is now, The Haus of Klaus is an ABSOLUTELY FANTASTIC ROBOT SHOOTER and I'm truly looking forword to blowing up Haus's evil lair ....
...if I can just find the.....

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. The score + health status is now slightly lower in version 0.3.7. I can look at making the positioning user-adjustable in future.
